articles.title: Latest Updates: Iran launches new attacks on U.S. allies after 3 American troops killed in escalating war - CBS News
articles.description: Iran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan and a ship in the Strait of Hormuz as at least 3 U.S. forces are killed and dozens wounded in the escalating conflict.
articles.content:
At least three U.S. servicemembers were killed over the weekend in Iranian attacks,

articles.title: Coffee lovers can take heart: Up to 5 cups a day appears safe for most adults, experts say - Fox News
articles.description: The American Heart Association says up to 400 milligrams of caffeine daily may lower risk of heart disease, stroke and Type 2 diabetes — with a key caveat.
articles.content:
Coffee drinkers may not have to feel guilty about reaching for another cup.

articles.title: Man stabs tourists near the Acropolis in Athens, Greece - AP News
articles.description: A man has stabbed and wounded two tourists near the ancient Acropolis in Athens, Greece’s top tourist attraction. The assailant attacked a man and a woman, both Greek Americans, with a knife Tuesday morning near the entrance to the Acropolis Museum, which lie…
articles.content:
ATHENS, Greece (AP) A man stabbed and wounded two tourists Tuesday morning near the ancient Acropolis in Athens, Greeces top tourist attraction, police said.
